# .Env

Converted from `reference_implementation/.env.example` so the pack remains Markdown-only.

```text
# No real API keys are required for the mock pipeline.
# Add keys only when implementing real adapters and after guardrails/evals pass.
GOOGLE_ADS_DEVELOPER_TOKEN=
META_ACCESS_TOKEN=
LINKEDIN_ACCESS_TOKEN=
TIKTOK_ACCESS_TOKEN=
OPENAI_API_KEY=
```
